title: Multi-agent escalation divergence — planner readonly vs executor write scope
stakeholder_intent: Planner agent policy: the root filesystem is read-only per container policy. Executor agents must not broaden write scope without human review.
formalized_policy: Executor agent: Write access to /var is allowed for application logs and runtime state.
implementation_claim: Executor agent: Write access to /var is allowed for application logs and runtime state.
expected_issue: Planner and executor interpret escalation differently: structural diff is silent (partial readonly_root_fs not in weakening lattice), but Z3 finds write_allowed violates intent — triangulation disagreement preserved. Operational interpretation: HOLD deployment until layers reconcile.
